creator: thomas.e.zander@googlemail.com
text:
"Me too".

We have seen this problem with other ports as well, for example
multimedia/ogmtools and its dependency on libdvdread.

In this particular case, why can't we get rid of hal altogether? It's
a horrible horrible terrible horrid superfluous piece of software that
should really not be anywhere near xorg-server.

Riggs
